product_overview: Public frontend for Ommalak — a Mauritania-focused service marketplace that connects clients with local workers. The web UI provides an animated branded experience, bilingual branding, and worker profile contact & rate details.
core_goals: Allow visitors to discover and inspect individual workers' contact details and daily rate expectations.
Present a clear, localized brand experience (French/Arabic) that respects RTL layout for Arabic.
Provide an immediate visual loading state (animated splash) so users know the app is initializing.

features.name: SplashScreen Animation
features.description: Show an animated Ommalak logo with ripple and dot loader animations during application startup so users perceive quick, responsive loading.
user_flows: Open the application landing page -> View animated Ommalak logo with ripple effect -> Observe dot loaders indicating progress -> See main landing content appear after animation completes

features.name: Navigation Brand Logo (bilingual)
features.description: Display the brand name in the navbar translated between French and Arabic according to the selected language and layout direction.
user_flows: Open the application -> Set interface language to Arabic -> View brand name in navbar displayed in Arabic (عمــــالك) -> Observe RTL layout for navbar content
Open the application -> Set interface language to French -> View brand name in navbar displayed in French (Ommalak) -> Observe LTR layout for navbar content

features.name: Worker Profile Contact Information
features.description: Present a worker's public contact details and salary expectations so clients can evaluate and contact workers directly.
user_flows: Open a worker listing or search results -> Open a worker's profile -> View worker's city or location -> View worker's phone number -> View worker's daily rate / salary expectation (MRU)

features.name: SplashScreen Animation
features.description: Render animated Ommalak logo with framer-motion ripple effect and dot loaders.

features.name: Navigation Brand Logo
features.description: Dynamic brand logo name translation between French (Ommalak) and Arabic (عمــــالك) based on selected language.
user_interactions: View brand name in navbar based on language

features.name: Worker Profile Contact Information
features.description: Display worker location (city), phone number, and salary expectations (daily rate in MRU).
user_interactions: View worker's daily rate / salary expectation
